Description__c: As a mobile user I want to login using fingerprint or face recognition so that I can access my account quickly and securely
Acceptance_Criteria__c: Fingerprint auth works on iOS and Android; Face recognition works on supported devices; Fallback to PIN if biometric fails; Session timeout after 5 minutes of inactivity

Description__c: As a user I want to receive an SMS verification code so that my account has an extra layer of security
Acceptance_Criteria__c: SMS sent within 5 seconds; Code expires after 3 minutes; Maximum 3 retry attempts; Clear error messages for invalid codes
Pending_Reason__c: Waiting for SMS gateway API credentials from vendor

Description__c: As a user I want to see all my account balances on one screen so that I can quickly check my financial status
Acceptance_Criteria__c: Shows all linked accounts; Real-time balance updates; Last 5 transactions per account; Pull-to-refresh functionality

Description__c: As a developer I want a paginated transaction history API so that the mobile app can efficiently load transaction data
Acceptance_Criteria__c: Supports pagination (20 items per page); Filter by date range and amount; Response time under 200ms; Proper error handling for invalid parameters

Description__c: As a user I want a simple payment form so that I can send money to other users easily
Acceptance_Criteria__c: Auto-complete for saved recipients; Amount validation with daily limits; Confirmation screen before sending; Success/failure notification

Description__c: As a system administrator I want API rate limiting so that the system is protected from abuse
Acceptance_Criteria__c: Configurable rate limits per client; Returns 429 status when exceeded; Sliding window algorithm; Bypass for whitelisted IPs

Description__c: As a developer I want automated CI/CD so that code deployments are consistent and reliable
Acceptance_Criteria__c: Automated unit tests on PR; Deploy to staging on merge; Rollback capability; Slack notifications on failure

Description__c: As an API consumer I want automatic token refresh so that my sessions do not expire unexpectedly
Acceptance_Criteria__c: Token refresh 5 minutes before expiry; Seamless to end user; Audit log of refreshes; Revoke capability for compromised tokens

Description__c: As a customer I want a branded login page so that I can access the portal securely
Acceptance_Criteria__c: Login works with email+password; Forgot password flow; CAPTCHA on failed attempts; Branded styling applied

Description__c: As an admin I want to see usage analytics so that I can make informed decisions
Acceptance_Criteria__c: Shows daily/weekly/monthly active users; Export to CSV; Filters by date range

Description__c: As a new user I want a guided onboarding so that I can set up my account easily
Acceptance_Criteria__c: 5-step wizard; Skip option available; Progress indicator; Completes in under 3 minutes

Description__c: As an operations team member I want a migration script so that we can move customer data from the old system
Acceptance_Criteria__c: Zero data loss; Idempotent script; Full audit log; Rollback capability

Description__c: As a user I want to receive payment notifications so that I know when transactions complete
Acceptance_Criteria__c: Push notification within 2 seconds; Email backup; Dismissible; Deep link to transaction
